products.short_desc: TANK CHHAP FLORAL VINE PRINT LAVENDER PVC LONG COAT
products.long_desc: This is a Taiwan 999 Tank Chhap Raincoat featuring a translucent lavender-tinted PVC build with an all-over deep purple floral vine print. It features a full-length silhouette with a white drawstring hood and a central black snap-button closure. The design is finished with reinforced waterproof seams and wide sleeves for a comfortable fit over daily wear.
